base_read.sql: SELECT a.assignment_number AS ASG_NUM, MAX(s.salary_id) AS SALARY_ID, MAX(s.salary_amount) AS SALARY_AMOUNT FROM cmp_salary s JOIN per_all_assignments_m a ON a.assignment_id = s.assignment_id AND a.effective_latest_change='Y' WHERE s.salary_basis_id = 300000048365126 AND s.date_from = DATE '${SAL_DATE_DASH}' AND a.assignment_number IN ('E10','E12','E14') GROUP BY a.assignment_number
